entries.title: N_106_01_Phone_lock_Method_by_Progkey
entries.raw_action: Press the "Lock" Progkey to enable the lock function.
entries.raw_expected_result:
The device shows the locked screen.
LOCK icon in the center of the screen.
LOCK icon, next to the time in the topbar.
LOCK icon a the top left of the screen to Lock or unlock the device.
The screensaver starts between 1 minute and 1 hour, depending on the screen saver settings.
The screen saver bubble is visible and shows only the closed LOCK icon, the date and the time.
If other events notification are present they are displayed next to the LOCK icon. (number of missed and voice messages)
The bubble alternately appears with the closed LOCK icon and the with company’s custom icon.
entries.normalized_action: Press the lock progkey to enable the lock function.
entries.normalized_expected_result: The device shows the locked screen.

Dial 112 on blocked device.
And then release the call.
entries.raw_expected_result:
Outgoing call is automatically launched to 112 (no need to launch with OK, handset key, ...).
Tested device displays an outgoing call to 112.
User has no other option than to end the call.
After releasing the call device is still blocked, displaying the info "Your phone is blocked" on screen.
entries.normalized_expected_result: The outgoing call is automatically launched to 112. The tested device displays an outgoing call to 112.
